plans.name: Starter 5
features: Data speeds reduced after 5 GB until next cycle
plans.best_for: Light users who want a cheap, no-commitment plan

plans.name: Value 15
features: Data speeds reduced after 15 GB until next cycle
plans.best_for: Moderate users who want 5G without a contract

plans.name: Prepaid Unlimited
features: Data may be slowed during network congestion after 35 GB
plans.best_for: Heavy users who want unlimited data with no contract

plans.name: Essential
features: Autopay discount of $5/month included in price
plans.best_for: Single line users who want a reliable postpaid plan

plans.name: Unlimited
features: Includes calls and texts to Canada and Mexico
plans.best_for: Single line users who never want to think about data caps

plans.name: Unlimited Plus
features: Premium 5G Ultra Wideband data, never slowed
Free device protection for one device
plans.best_for: Power users and frequent travelers who want the top-tier plan

plans.name: Family Unlimited (4 lines)
plans.intro_offer: First 3 months 20% off for new accounts
features: Free parental controls and content filtering
plans.best_for: Families wanting multiple unlimited lines at a lower per-line price

plans.name: Data-Only 30
features: Designed for tablets, hotspots, and connected devices
plans.best_for: Tablets, mobile hotspots, and secondary data devices

plans.name: 55+ Plan
plans.eligibility: At least one account holder must be 55 or older
features: Simplified billing and large-print statements available
Free scam and spam call protection
plans.best_for: Customers 55+ who want two unlimited lines at a low price

plans.name: Student Unlimited
plans.eligibility: Valid enrollment at an accredited college or university; reverify annually
features: Unlimited 5G data at a student discount
plans.best_for: Verified students who want unlimited data on a budget

plans.name: International Day Pass
features: Use your existing plan's data, talk, and text abroad
Billed only on days you use your device internationally
Charge capped at 10 days per billing cycle, then included free for the rest of the cycle
plans.best_for: Short international trips where you want to keep your normal number and plan

plans.name: International Monthly Pass
features: 15 GB of high-speed data abroad each month
Better value than the Day Pass for trips longer than 5 days
plans.best_for: Extended travel or expats who need consistent monthly international coverage

plans.name: International Calling Pack
plans.coverage: Calls from the US to 80+ countries
features: Discounted calling from the US to international numbers
Unlimited calls to landlines in 30 included countries
Does not cover usage while you are physically abroad (see roaming passes)
plans.best_for: Customers who call family or contacts overseas from within the US

plans.name: Hotspot Boost
features: Adds 15 GB of high-speed mobile hotspot data to any eligible plan
Stacks on top of your plan's included hotspot allowance
plans.best_for: Customers who tether laptops or other devices and run out of hotspot data
